source: PokéAPI REST summarized for offline runtime use

abilities.name: Cute Charm
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon may infatuate attackers that make direct contact with it.

abilities.name: Competitive
abilities.effect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat sharply when its stats are lowered by an opposing Pokémon.

abilities.name: Friend Guard
abilities.effect: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.
abilities.flavor_text: Reduces damage dealt to allies.

abilities.name: Oblivious
abilities.effect: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Tinted Lens
abilities.effect: Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon can use “not very effective” moves to deal regular damage.

abilities.name: Prankster
abilities.effect: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: Gives priority to the Pokémon's status moves.

abilities.name: Prankster
abilities.effect: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: Gives priority to the Pokémon's status moves.

abilities.name: Frisk
abilities.effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon's held item.

abilities.name: Pickpocket
abilities.effect: Steals attacking Pokémon's held items on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon steals the held item from attackers that made direct contact with it.

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.effect: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Fire-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

abilities.name: Own Tempo
abilities.effect: Prevents confusion.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon sticks to its own tempo, preventing it from becoming confused or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Synchronize
abilities.effect: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon will be inflicted with the same status condition.

abilities.name: Psychic Surge
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.
abilities.flavor_text: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Inner Focus
abilities.effect: Prevents flinching.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Synchronize
abilities.effect: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon will be inflicted with the same status condition.

abilities.name: Psychic Surge
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.
abilities.flavor_text: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.effect: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Fire-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Iron Fist
abilities.effect: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up punching moves.

abilities.name: Contrary
abilities.effect: Inverts stat changes.
abilities.flavor_text: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them—and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.

abilities.name: Suction Cups
abilities.effect: Prevents being forced out of battle by other Pokémon's moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.

abilities.name: Infiltrator
abilities.effect: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's moves are unaffected by the target's barriers, substitutes, and the like.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.effect: Strengthens Water moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Sniper
abilities.effect: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon's attack lands a critical hit, the attack is powered up even further.

abilities.name: Quark Drive
abilities.effect: Raises highest stat on Electric Terrain, or if holding Booster Energy.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

abilities.name: Chlorophyll
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.
